'''Vannix''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vannix system/Legends|Vankalay system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], in a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] bordering the [[Kuat sector/Legends|Kuat sector]]. It was represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] by [[Addath Gadan]] until she advocated appeasing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Planet-stub}}
